title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Oral Thrush
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra tinctures contains active constituents like glycyrrhizin and flavonoids. These compounds have antifungal and anti-inflammatory properties that help combat oral thrush. Glycyrrhizin inhibits the growth of Candida albicans, the fungus responsible for the condition. The flavonoids, such as licoflavone, have antioxidant effects that reduce inflammation and soothe the affected tissues.
